docket_entries.description: SC 105- ANSWER. FILED BY DEFENDANT GENESIS LENDING SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-04-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
